segments.text: Yahweh says:{

For three transgressions of Moab, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment, 
because he burned the bones of the king of Edom into lime;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
but I will send a fire on Moab, and it will devour the palaces of Kerioth; 
and Moab will die with tumult, with shouting, and with the sound of the trumpet;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and I will cut off the judge from among them, and will kill all its princes with him,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Yahweh says:{

For three transgressions of Judah, yes, for four, I will not turn away its punishment, 
because they have rejected Yahweh’s law, 
and have not kept his statutes, 
and their lies have led them astray, 
after which their fathers walked;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: but I will send a fire on Judah, and it will devour the palaces of Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Yahweh says:{

segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
They trample the heads of the poor into the dust of the earth
and deny justice to the oppressed. A man and his father use the same maiden, to profane my holy name.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
They lay themselves down beside every altar on clothes taken in pledge. 
In the house of their God they drink the wine of those who have been fined.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Yet I destroyed the Amorite before them, whose height was like the height of the cedars, 
and he was strong as the oaks; 
yet I destroyed his fruit from above, 
and his roots from beneath.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Also I brought you up out of the land of Egypt and led you forty years in the wilderness, 
to possess the land of the Amorite.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I raised up some of your sons for prophets, and some of your young men for Nazirites. Isn’t this true, you children of Israel?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh.
But you gave the Nazirites wine to drink, and commanded the prophets, saying, ‘Don’t prophesy!’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Behold,  I will crush you in your place, as a cart crushes that is full of grain.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Flight will perish from the swift. The strong won’t strengthen his force. 
The mighty won’t deliver himself.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
He who handles the bow won’t st and. He who is swift of foot won’t escape. 
He who rides the horse won’t deliver himself.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He who is courageous among the mightywill flee away naked on that day,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh.
